questions.scenario: An admin VPN should be allowed to SSH into a bastion VM on TCP 22. Which direction should the rule use on the bastion target?
questions.explanation: The bastion is receiving a new connection, so the target-side rule is ingress.

questions.scenario: A worker VM must call a third-party HTTPS API, and outbound traffic is restricted. Which direction is relevant for the worker rule?

options.text: Egress from the worker target to the API destination.
Ingress to the worker from the API.

questions.explanation: The worker starts the outbound connection, so its restricted outbound path is an egress question.

questions.scenario: Which details help decide firewall direction?

options.text: Which resource is the target of the rule.
Whether the packet is entering or leaving the target.
The color of the Cloud Console graph.

questions.explanation: Direction is about packet flow relative to the target resource.
